currentState: Brisk professional tolerance. Sylvanas is not crew, Dagny is not soldier, but both recognize real command in the other and do not waste time pretending otherwise.
powerDynamic: Dagny controls the ship. Sylvanas controls her people. Their authority overlaps only where passenger survival and deck discipline meet.

stateHistory.currentState: Introduced in chapter20 as captain and military passenger sharing one dangerous objective without sharing a chain of command.

physicalDynamics.pattern: The relationship stays all in stance and territorial certainty: Dagny planted in ship-command space, Sylvanas moving as the person responsible for her own line within it.

nameUsage.dagnyCallsSylvanas: Captain-to-passenger authority, with no false deference once the ship is underway.
nameUsage.sylvanasCallsDagny: Captain-first practical respect; Sylvanas treats maritime command as a real lane rather than a decorative one.

history.event: The Wolfheart crossing makes Dagny and Sylvanas parallel authorities in adjacent domains, each letting the other keep her own lane so the voyage can succeed.

trajectory: Chapter 20 establishes a clean professional respect between two women used to command, each inside a different system.
